quotes: Limit focal points per section — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Ensure clean visual hierarchy and prevent cluttered layouts.
rules.rule_text: To maintain generous white space and direct attention cleanly, limit each section to a single primary focal point.

quotes: alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**

rules.intent: Delineate topics visually using color blocks and prevent adjacent sections from visually merging.
rules.rule_text: Adjacent assembled sections must not share the same background color. Section designers must declare background color metadata (White, Light Blue, Golden Sand, or Gradient) to allow assemblers to sequence safely.
